creator: mmatalka@gmail.com
text:
I turned virutal_oss off and ran usbdump and configured audacity to record from the correct device and I see a lot of the following:

15:28:37.696164 usbus1.5 SUBM-ISOC-EP=00000081,SPD=HIGH,NFR=2,SLEN=0,IVAL=0
15:28:37.696168 usbus1.5 DONE-ISOC-EP=00000081,SPD=HIGH,NFR=0,SLEN=0,IVAL=0,ERR=TIMEOUT
15:28:37.951041 usbus1.5 DONE-ISOC-EP=00000081,SPD=HIGH,NFR=0,SLEN=0,IVAL=0,ERR=TIMEOUT
15:28:37.951073 usbus1.5 SUBM-ISOC-EP=00000081,SPD=HIGH,NFR=2,SLEN=0,IVAL=0


I am compiling my own kernel so happy to try patches if anyone has them!
